purpose: Comparator targets consume baseline checker artifacts and produce bounded realization-discriminator evidence. These are not theorem results unless separately promoted by formal proof.

targets.predicate: Within the declared finite baseline artifacts, associahedron A has a single local cover mechanism based on adding one noncrossing diagonal, while cosmohedron C has two source-stated cover mechanisms: delete a bracket and contract a minimal bracket. The comparator records finite evidence for a local move-burden distinction without promoting it to all-n theorem or realization-class equivalence.
targets.failure_condition: Any input artifact is missing, failed, has counterexamples, lacks the expected support boundary, or the finite artifacts do not expose the declared one-vs-two local cover-mechanism split.
